narrative:
30 Ohio House district has 84,946 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -3.8% D−R vs -32.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
